title: lindsaea obtusa
intro: Lindsaea obtusa is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae, commonly known as a type of tree fern or rock fern. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia, and its rhizome and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizome of Lindsaea obtusa are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
